_warning: TEST ONLY — do not use in production. This keypair is derived from a fixed, publicly known seed and provides no security. It exists solely to make AFAuth test vectors reproducible and inspectable.

_provenance._note: private_key_raw_hex is the Ed25519 32-byte seed used to derive the signing key per RFC 8032 §5.1.5. public_key_raw_hex is the corresponding 32-byte point compression.
